Documents review.documentSreviewcommentBusinessPlan: Business plan reviewed and found to be comprehensive. Financial projections are realistic and well-supported.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentInfrastructure: Infrastructure layout plan is complete and meets all regulatory requirements.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentLicences: All required licences and supporting documents have been verified and are valid.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentResettlement: Resettlement statement reviewed. No displacement issues identified.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentLandlord: Landlord affidavit verified and properly notarized.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentApprovedPlans: Reviewed and found satisfactory. No issues identified.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentOccHealth: Occupational health and safety documentation is satisfactory and meets OSHA requirements.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentTaxCompliance: Tax compliance certificate verified with TAJ. Entity is in good standing.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentFinalMaster: Master plan reviewed and found comprehensive.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentOccupancy: Occupational health and safety documentation is satisfactory and meets OSHA requirements.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentLandDispute: Affidavit of no land dispute verified. No encumbrances found on record.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentDesignPlans: Design plans reviewed and found compliant with development order requirements.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentSafetySecurity: Safety, security and business continuity plans are comprehensive and adequate.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentOwner: Owner affidavit verified. Ownership documentation consistent with title records.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentArticles: Articles of incorporation verified with Companies Office of Jamaica.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentDisaster: Disaster mitigation plan reviewed and found adequate.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentPhasing: Phasing and expansion plan is realistic and well-structured.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentShareCapital: Share capital proof verified. Minimum capitalization requirements met.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentTransportMaps: Transportation maps and logistics plans are satisfactory.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentScheduleAreas: Schedule of areas reviewed and consistent with submitted plans.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentVendor: Vendor affidavit verified and properly executed.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentVisual: Visual impressions and renderings are of acceptable quality.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentCertIncorp: Certificate of incorporation verified with Companies Office of Jamaica.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentLease: Long-term lease agreement reviewed. Terms are acceptable.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentExciseGoods: Excise goods security plan meets JCA requirements.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentCertTitle: Certificate of title verified with National Land Agency.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentPlotLayout: Plot layout map is accurate and consistent with surveyor report.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentSurveyor: Surveyor identification report verified. Boundaries clearly demarcated.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentConceptMaster: Master plan reviewed and found comprehensive.
Documents review.documentSreviewcommentLandUse: Land use plan is compatible with local development order.
Documents review.documentSreviewCommentsOfTheReviewer: All documents reviewed and verified. Application package is complete.
